title: orchis orientalis subsp. cilicica
intro: Orchis orientalis subsp. cilicica is a rare and endangered subspecies of orchid, which is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orchis orientalis subsp. cilicica include treating conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and skin diseases, as well as providing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
